statusLegend.verified: Claim backed by test or wired code at the cited file:line. Read the evidence before believing.
statusLegend.partial: Capability exists but a documented gap blocks production use.
statusLegend.missing: Capability is not implemented or live-stubbed.

items.claim: 22+ providers supported
items.evidence: packages/core/src/runtime/providers/providerRegistry.ts:42-188 — registers 24 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Azure, Bedrock, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, GLM, MiMo, Xiaomi, Cohere, Mistral, Groq, Together, Perplexity, Fireworks, Replicate, XAI, Anyscale, DeepInfra, Agnes, Ollama, VLLM, StepFun)

items.claim: All 24 providers resolve via EncryptedSecretsVault when available, plain env-var fallback otherwise
items.evidence: packages/core/src/security/secureApiKeyResolver.ts — resolveSecureApiKey covers all providers in the registry; G5 vault initialized in CommanderHttpServer.start() before any provider call (packages/core/src/runtime/httpServer.ts:790-810)
items.notes: Zero remaining direct process.env.<PROVIDER>_API_KEY reads in production code paths verified 2026-07-02.

items.claim: 5 canonical topologies (SINGLE / CHAIN / DISPATCH / ORCHESTRATOR / REVIEW)
items.evidence: packages/core/src/ultimate/types.ts:52,63 — OrchestrationTopology union; selectTopologyForEffort & classifyEffortLevel in effortRules.ts
items.notes: Older alias names retained @deprecated for 0.x → 1.0 transition window.

items.claim: Thompson-sampling-based automatic topology selection
items.evidence: packages/core/src/ultimate/topologyOptimizer.ts — ReflexionTopologicalOptimizer + epsilon-greedy store; ablation evidence in docs/results-2026-06-23.json

items.claim: SSE streaming with backpressure-aware emit
items.evidence: packages/core/src/runtime/sseStream.ts handles res.writeHead/text-event-stream; 4 named streaming subscribers in CommanderHttpServer.handleStreamRequest

items.claim: Per-IP SSE connection limit (10/IP) + connection drain on shutdown
items.evidence: CommanderHttpServer.MAX_SSE_PER_IP=10 enforced in handleStreamRequest; gracefulShutdown drains via server.close + 10s force-close timeout
items.notes: Without this guard, EACH /stream request would consume a Node HTTP connection indefinitely — pre-fix was the documented S1-Audit finding.

items.claim: Per-provider circuit breaker with OPEN/HALF_OPEN/CLOSED states
items.evidence: packages/core/src/sandbox/circuitBreakerRegistry.ts — class-level breakerFor + Providers.getProviderHealth() surface state

items.claim: Per-category dead-letter queue with NDJSON append-only storage
items.evidence: packages/core/src/runtime/deadLetterQueue.ts:1-7 — append-only NDJSON; 7 categories (llm/tool/execution/verification/circuit_breaker/compensation/semantic_drift); FailureMode discriminator standardized Tier 4.1

items.claim: Saga-based compensating transaction runtime
items.evidence: packages/core/src/saga — CompensationScheduler, SagaCoordinator, InMemorySagaStore, FileSagaStore, CompensationFn retry policy

items.claim: WAL + JSON dual-write checkpointing with crash-safe recovery
items.evidence: packages/core/src/runtime/checkpointWriter.ts; packages/core/src/atr/recoveryBootstrapper.ts (zombie-scan + fence + reclaim)

items.claim: Tenant-aware singletons + runWithTenant AsyncLocalStorage
items.evidence: packages/core/src/runtime/tenantAwareSingleton.ts (singleton utility); CommanderHttpServer.requireTenant() gates multi-tenant endpoints
items.notes: Isolation requires the storage backend to filter by tenantId; the singleton layer provides the API but does not enforce DB-level isolation. Pilot customers must verify their storage backend. See ENTERPRISE_READINESS.md.

items.claim: Automated cross-tenant fuzz test suite
items.notes: Listed in security_architecture_hardening_roadmap.md G6; not yet delivered. Tracked in ENTERPRISE_READINESS.md.

items.claim: Hook manager with beforeLLMCall/afterLLMCall/beforeToolCall/afterToolCall/agentStart/agentComplete/error hooks
items.evidence: packages/core/src/pluginManager.ts; exported hook-point types from index.ts; builtin-evidence plugins live in packages/core/src/plugins/builtin/

items.claim: Auto-discovery from .commander/plugins/ and ~/.commander/plugins/
items.evidence: packages/core/src/pluginLoader.ts — getPluginLoader().loadAll() called by apps/api on startup (index.ts)

items.claim: @commander/plugin-sdk consumer-ready API surface for external plugin authors
items.evidence: packages/plugin-sdk exists with exports; no third-party consumer observed in the wild
items.notes: Surface is stable, ecosystem is empty. README claims 'Under development' until a third-party ships a non-trivial plugin using the surface.

items.claim: Heuristic regex gates: hallucination check, hedging detection
items.evidence: packages/core/src/ultimate/qualityGates.ts — HALLUCINATION_CHECK, CONSISTENCY, COMPLETENESS, LLM_JUDGE

items.claim: LLM-as-judge evaluation with dataset versioning and A/B comparison
items.evidence: packages/core/src/plugins/builtin/eval — LLMJudgeEvaluator + getSharedJudgeEngine + getSharedDatasetManager + getSharedABComparator
items.notes: Replaces the previous regex hedging false-positives that penalized 'on the other hand' / 'might be' phrasing.

items.claim: Meta-learning trajectory analyzer + evolver agent
items.evidence: packages/core/src/selfEvolution/metaLearner.ts

items.claim: Activation requires 5+ runs
items.evidence: Documented in README; activation window in selfEvolution; not externally validated at scale
items.notes: Cold-start users will see limited adaptation in first 5 runs; this is by design — there is no historical data to learn from.

items.claim: AES-256-GCM EncryptedSecretsVault backed API key resolution
items.evidence: packages/core/src/security/encryptedSecretsVault.ts; CommanderHttpServer.initializeSecretVault() wires it on startup

items.claim: Zero remaining direct process.env._API_KEY reads for any provider
items.evidence: grep -rn 'process\.env\.[A-Z_]+_KEY' packages/core/src/runtime/providers (2026-07-02) returns no matches; all 24 providers in registry use resolveSecureApiKey

items.claim: Automated adversarial testing harness with regression baselines
items.evidence: packages/core/src/security/redTeamFramework.ts; .github/workflows/red-team.yml + adversarial-corpus.yml

items.claim: ISO 42001 / NIST AI RMF / EU AI Act automated report generation
items.evidence: packages/core/src/security/complianceAuditReport.ts (ISO 42001 + NIST AI RMF); packages/core/src/security/euAiActCompliance.ts (Articles 12/13/14)
items.notes: Reporters read existing security state (audit chain, security monitor, posture snapshots). Exposed via /api/v1/security/{compliance-audit,eu-ai-act,owasp-agentic-ai-top10}.

items.claim: Runtime Application Self-Protection (G1 hardening)
items.evidence: packages/core/src/plugins/builtin/rasp-extensions (G1); event handlers wired into HookManager
items.notes: Recent scan coverage gap: agentload/observability-shield scenarios. Tracked in security_architecture_hardening_roadmap.md.

items.claim: W3C distributed trace context propagation end-to-end
items.evidence: packages/core/src/runtime/distributedTracing.ts — extractTraceFromHeaders + createTraceContext + runWithTrace

items.claim: OpenTelemetry exporter + persistence
items.evidence: packages/core/src/runtime/openTelemetryExporter.ts (getOTelExporter singleton)

items.claim: Prometheus-compatible /metrics endpoint
items.evidence: apps/api/src/index.ts:/metrics (text/plain; version=0.0.4 + businessMetrics merge) + CommanderHttpServer /metrics endpoint

items.claim: War Room SSE dashboard
items.evidence: apps/web/components/LiveMetrics.tsx — consumes /projects/:projectId/events via API_BASE
items.notes: Previously hardcoded http://localhost:4000; now correctly bound to configured API_BASE. See commit fb3a14e.

items.claim: Xyflow topology visualization + Recharts cost dashboard + dnd-kit workflow editor
items.evidence: apps/web/components/ — TopologyDiagram.tsx, CostDashboard.tsx, WorkflowEditor.tsx

items.claim: <90s from `git clone` to first agent token
items.evidence: pnpm install (~60-90s on clean checkout) + pnpm gui start window
items.notes: Known limitations: Windows SQLite requires MSVC fallback (documented); `commander gui` requires both @commander/web and @commander/api workspaces built. See docs/deploy.md.
